Localization.Description: A user performed an action with an SSL certificate or stopped using it

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} activated SSL certificate {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted SSL certificate {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} imported SSL certificate {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} stopped using SSL certificate {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
